title: client not allowed
summary: The bearer token client is not in the configured `allowed_clients` list.
description: The bearer token client is not in the configured `allowed_clients` list.

guidance.note: No per-identifier remediation guidance is published in this resolver record.

authority.statement: This site identifies stable Registry Stack identifiers and links to public documentation. Product documentation, published schemas, and the actual service response remain authoritative for runtime behavior. For problem responses, use the stable code extension and the response status/detail fields. Do not parse URL paths for program logic.

identifier_policy.parsing: Do not parse semantics from the URL path.
